design_philosophy: Linear.app precision combined with a hacker-grade command center. High data density, sharp edges, pure text-based navigation, and glowing active states. Absolutely no CRT/retro aesthetics.

layout.spacing: Dense. Use p-4 to p-6 internally for cards to ensure data fits well on 1920x1080.

sidebar.style: bg-zinc-950 border-r border-zinc-900 flex flex-col justify-between py-6
sidebar.navigation_items: NO ICONS. Use a numbered monospace format: '[01] DASHBOARD', '[02] NETWORK', '[03] ALERTS', '[04] TICKETS', '[05] SETTINGS'. Active state uses text-zinc-50 and a 2px left border of #FAFAFA. Inactive uses text-zinc-500.

main_content.grid: grid grid-cols-12 gap-4 p-6 bg-zinc-950 h-screen overflow-hidden

zones.syslog: col-span-12 h-48 bg-black border border-zinc-800 font-mono text-xs overflow-y-auto

surface.base: bg-[#121214] border border-zinc-800 rounded-none shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden
surface.header: flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-zinc-800/50 bg-[#09090B]

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-950 hover:bg-zinc-300 rounded-none font-mono text-xs uppercase px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white rounded-none font-mono text-xs uppercase px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-400 hover:text-white rounded-none font-mono text-xs uppercase px-2 py-1

badges.base: px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono border rounded-none uppercase tracking-wider

tables.header: text-[10px] font-mono uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500 border-b border-zinc-800 pb-2

motion.indicators: Active nodes and live critical alerts MUST use the Tailwind animate-ping utility (opacity-75, scale-150) paired with a solid core dot to simulate hardware LEDs.
motion.transitions: Use fast, crisp transitions (duration-150 ease-in-out). Avoid bouncy or slow spring animations.
motion.loading_states: Do not use generic spinners. Use a rapid opacity pulse on standard monospace characters (e.g., '[ LOADING... ]') or structural skeleton boxes with sharp corners.

network_map.style: Abstracted geometric map. Use pure SVG with 1px zinc-800 lines for the hub-spoke model connecting MI, OH, and IN sites.
network_map.nodes: Sites are represented by small squares (not circles) with an inner status color and an outer glowing/pinging ring if active or alarming.

vendor_health.style: Ultra-dense. 5 minimalist blocks in a row. Layout: Top label (font-mono text-[10px]), bottom value ('OPERATIONAL' in green, 'DEGRADED' in amber). 1px border. Leftmost 2px of the block uses the status color as a structural accent.

syslog.style: True terminal aesthetic. bg-black. text-[10px] or text-xs JetBrains Mono. Timestamp in zinc-600, severity in status color, message in zinc-300.

technical_requirements.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-alerts').
technical_requirements.implementation: Do not use generic Shadcn cards with heavy drop shadows and rounded corners. Strip `rounded-xl` and replace with `rounded-none`. Force tight paddings.
